doc_html:
Art 681.  Opening in common wall.

The co-owner of a common wall may not make any opening in the wall without the consent of his neighbor.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.

Art 681.  Opening in common wall.
The co-owner of a common wall may not make any opening in the wall without the consent of his neighbor.
Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
